chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.S-550 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.4580/2025 (If granted). 2. For orders on office objection Nos.1 to 6 as at “A”. 3. For orders on CMA No.4581/2025 (Exemption). 4. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 09.07.2025 M/s. Abdul Hayee Kolachi, Atta Muhammad Kolachi and Muhammad Saleh, Advocates for the petitioner along with petitioner. Mr. K.A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. Through the instant petition the petitioner has claimed following relief:- a. To direct the official Respondents No.3 to 5 to conduct departmental inquiry against the Respondent No.6 i.e. S.H.O of Police Station Ibrahim Hydari namely Ghous Bux and his team members, and take strict legal action against them for the offence committed by them. b. To direct the Respondent No.5 & 6 to not lodge any other false and bogus FIR against the petitioner for blackmail, pressurize, harass and threaten the petitioner. c. To direct the Respondent No.6, his team members, agents, colleagues, friend(s), representatives or any other else, acting on his behalf from blackmailing, pressurizing, harassing and threatening the petitioner by visiting the residential as well as business places of the petitioner without due course of law and provide legal protection to the petitioner from the hands of SHO of P.S Ibrahim Hyderi/ Respondent No.6 and his teams members as well as companions. When confronted as to how this petition to the extent of certain directions for conducting departmental inquiry is maintainable, the counsel has frankly conceded and withdrawn the prayer clause “a” and “b” of the petition.

To direct the Respondent No.6, his team members, agents, colleagues, friend(s), representatives or any other else, acting on his behalf from blackmailing, pressurizing, harassing and threatening the petitioner by visiting the residential as well as business places of the petitioner without due course of law and provide legal protection to the petitioner from the hands of SHO of P.S Ibrahim Hyderi/ Respondent No.6 and his teams members as well as companions. When confronted as to how this petition to the extent of certain directions for conducting departmental inquiry is maintainable, the counsel has frankly conceded and withdrawn the prayer clause “a” and “b” of the petition. Learned Assistant Advocate General, who is present in Court in some other cases, has waived notice and submits that if directions 2 are issued to the concerned police officials to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law, he will concede for disposal of the petition. In the above circumstances, the respondents No.5 and 6 are directed to act strictly in accordance with law and ensure that no harassment is caused to the petitioner and provide protection to him as and when required in accordance with law. The petition stands disposed of along with pending applications. JUDGE Ayaz Gul
